# Pranav Antal

## Biography

Pranav Antal serves as the administrative and symbolic heart of the Utopia power, a control system from which Simguru Pranav Antal projects his vision of a harmonised, surveillance-based society. Located within the sphere of influence established during the first wave of powerplay expansions in 3301, the system anchors a network of communes dedicated to the Utopian philosophy of collective benefit over individual ambition.

Relative to other powers, Utopia's territory remained modest. In July 3301, an expansion attempt into the Federation system of Ewah was blocked by concentrated enemy resistance — one of the few setbacks the otherwise steady power faced. The system's low profile belied its significance as a proof-of-concept for Antal's controversial social model, where neural monitoring and behavioural conditioning create what supporters call "the safest society in human history" and critics label a surveillance dystopia.
